audit_scope: same-week raw USD TVL price-content screen
unit_disposition: USD TVL embeds asset-price effects; label as valuation-sensitive DeFi balance-sheet proxy.
prohibited_public_language: pure capital inflow; exogenous liquidity shock

unit_disposition: Raw OI growth is retained for audit only when OI is USD/notional-valued. CryptoQuant OI unit is treated as USD/notional unless provider metadata prove otherwise.
prohibited_public_language: pure leverage expansion independent of price

unit_disposition: OI/market-cap growth is preferred as the price-scaled OI state measure. CryptoQuant OI unit is treated as USD/notional unless provider metadata prove otherwise.
prohibited_public_language: pure leverage expansion independent of price
